testcase.name: TC002_getbillBatchStatus
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"BatchStatus":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"BAT10123123","BatchStatus":2,"Route":[],"BatchDate":{"BillPreparationDate":"2027-04-12","BillEditDate":"2027-04-12","BillPrintDate":"2027-04-12","BillPostDate":"1900-01-01","BillCreatedDate":"2027-04-12","BillModifiedDate":"2027-04-12","BillPeriodStartDate":"2017-04-17","BillPeriodEndDate":"2017-05-17","BillDate":"2017-05-17","ReadingDate":"2017-05-17","StatementDate":"2027-04-12","BTUDate":"2017-05-17"},"BatchDescription":"","BatchTotal":0.00000,"NumberOfTransactions":0,"TotalOnHoldOrWithError":0,"CycleId":"","PrepUserId":"sa","EditListUserId":"sa","PrintUserId":"sa","PostUserId":"","CheckBookId":"","BillType":1,"LocationId":"LOC@0004","PowerFactor":0.90000,"VersionNumber":0,"TransferCheckBatchId":""},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"BatchStatus":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Invalid Batch Id BAT10123123","Level":3}]}}] at com.NexustAPIAutomation.java.CommonMethods.getMethod(CommonMethods.java:706) at Private.BillingControllerv4.TC002_getbillBatchStatus(BillingControllerv4.java:468) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) ... Removed 33 stack frames

testcase.name: printcsvbillingStatements

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "40305/17/201706/16/2017This is your first quarter bill for 2000. Any balance not paid by May 15, 2000 will be releived on your year 2000 tax bill with penalties. This your first quarter bill for 2000. ELECWAT003 CUSTOMER010 Mrs. Gail M Dewar 0 78 MARINER BLVD NEW YORK NY USA 12345 MONTHLY EQUIPMENT015 03/31/2000 342002/28/2000 3356 64 EQUIPMENT015 04/12/2019 03/31/2000 3420 154.64 Previous Balance 1.00 Penalty for late payment 2.64 Penalty for overdue 1.20 Refuse Late Charges 2.59 Penalty for late payment 2.30 Penalty for late payment 5.84 Stepped range 0.36 Tax - USASTCITY-6* 0.06 Tax - USASTCITY-6* 15.00 Fixed charge 25.50 Stepped ranges 21.50 Phone fixed rate 4.10 Phone charge 12.00 Monthly Refuse Charge 285.73 Amount Due if Paid By 06/16/2017 300.02 Amount Due if Paid After 06/16/2017 154.64 130.6706/16/2017 285.73 643 2 3 2 1 12 11 10 9 8 7 6 Last Year NN1 ROUTEEW001 " Actual: 41007/01/200007/31/2000This is your first quarter bill for 2000. Any balance not paid by May 15, 2000 will be releived on your year 2000 tax bill with penalties. This your first quarter bill for 2000. MASTER001 MASTER001 Mr. Arthur K Dunning 100 WATER AVENUE APT 12 NEW YORK NY USA 34564 100 Water NEW YORK NY USA 57481 91EQUIPMENT001 06/30/2000 510003/31/2000 4650 450 996.38 Previous Balance -10.00 Adjustment 2.30 Late Payment Charge 1.72 Late Payment Charge 46.22 Late Payment Charge 22.83 Stepped range 13.98 Stepped range 1073.43 Amount Due if Paid By 07/31/2000 1127.10 Amount Due if Paid After 07/31/2000 986.38 87.0507/31/2000 1073.43 NN2

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "40305/17/201706/16/2017This is your first quarter bill for 2000. Any balance not paid by May 15, 2000 will be releived on your year 2000 tax bill with penalties. This your first quarter bill for 2000. ELECWAT003 CUSTOMER010 Mrs. Gail M Dewar 0 78 MARINER BLVD NEW YORK NY USA 12345 MONTHLY EQUIPMENT015 03/31/2000 342002/28/2000 3356 64 EQUIPMENT015 04/12/2019 03/31/2000 3420 154.64 Previous Balance 1.00 Penalty for late payment 2.64 Penalty for overdue 1.20 Refuse Late Charges 2.59 Penalty for late payment 2.30 Penalty for late payment 5.84 Stepped range 0.36 Tax - USASTCITY-6* 0.06 Tax - USASTCITY-6* 15.00 Fixed charge 25.50 Stepped ranges 21.50 Phone fixed rate 4.10 Phone charge 12.00 Monthly Refuse Charge 285.73 Amount Due if Paid By 06/16/2017 300.02 Amount Due if Paid After 06/16/2017 154.64 130.6706/16/2017 285.73 643 2 3 2 1 12 11 10 9 8 7 6 Last Year NN1 ROUTEEW001 " Actual: 41007/01/200007/31/2000This is your first quarter bill for 2000. Any balance not paid by May 15, 2000 will be releived on your year 2000 tax bill with penalties. This your first quarter bill for 2000. MASTER001 MASTER001 Mr. Arthur K Dunning 100 WATER AVENUE APT 12 NEW YORK NY USA 34564 100 Water NEW YORK NY USA 57481 91EQUIPMENT001 06/30/2000 510003/31/2000 4650 450 996.38 Previous Balance -10.00 Adjustment 2.30 Late Payment Charge 1.72 Late Payment Charge 46.22 Late Payment Charge 22.83 Stepped range 13.98 Stepped range 1073.43 Amount Due if Paid By 07/31/2000 1127.10 Amount Due if Paid After 07/31/2000 986.38 87.0507/31/2000 1073.43 NN2

org.codehaus.groovy.runtime.callsite.AbstractCallSite.callConstructor(AbstractCallSite.java:249) at testcase.name: getLocationsByCustomer_v3

failure.message: expected [{"LocationsByCustomer":[{"PageNumber":1,"TotalPages":1,"Customer":[{"Id":"CUSTOMER009","Type":"Primary","Name":"Contour","Title":"Mr.","FirstName":"Anthony","MiddleName":"W","LastName":"Bendetto"}],"Location":[{"Id":"LOCATION008","Description":"","STATUS":"Current","Class":"","ServiceAddress":[{"Line1":"4 Water st UNIT 145","DetailLine1":"4 Water st","DetailLine2":"UNIT 145","City":"NEW YORK","State":"NY","ZipCode":"12311","Country":"USA","Id":34}],"PrimaryCustomerId":"CUSTOMER009","FinanciallyResponsible":true,"AccountBalance":0,"MasterIncluded":"1","MoveInDate":"","MoveOutDate":"","ZoneId":"2","RouteId":"ROUTEE001","CycleId":"TESTCYCLEQUART","Udl":[{"Label":"Location001","value":""},{"Label":"Location002","value":""}],"RelatedCustomers":[{"Label":"Owner ID ","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER009","CustomerName":"Contour"},{"Label":"Tenant ","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER009","CustomerName":"Contour"},{"Label":"Landlord ","CustomerId":"","CustomerName":""}]}]}]}] but found [{"result":{"id":null,"Success":false,"Message":["ExcludeFormerLocationsWithZeroBalance must be a boolean"],"Values":{"CustomerId":"CUSTOMER009","LocationId":"LOCATION008","ExcludeFormerLocationsWithZeroBalance":"","OrderBy":"","PageNum":"1","NumPerPage":"50","Version":"3.0.0","IncludeBalance":false,"FormatZip":false}}}]
